name: Spicy Jicama Salad with Tangerines and Cilant
recipeIngredient: 1 small Jicama, peeled and cut into 3/4-inch cubes - 1 lb
1 Apple, red, skinned and cored, cut into 3/4-inch cubes
1/2 small Cantaloupe, peeled, seeded, cut into 3/4-inch cubes
3 Tangerines, peeled, broken into sections and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Place jicama in a large non-reactive bowl. Pour in orange juice and sprinkle with salt.
2. Toss well, cover, and let stand at room temperature for an hour or so.
3. About 15 minutes before serving, add apple, cantaloupe, tangerines, and cilantro to the bowl and mix thoroughly.
4. Continue tossing the mixture every few minutes until time to serve.
5. Season with chili powder and add more salt and cilantro if desired.
6. Toss one final time.
7. Scoop the salad into a serving bowl lined with romaine leaves.
